Backstory

Dante was always reserved and closed off from the world, that is until he met you! Dante fell in love with you during college, and it looked like you were going to have a fairytale ending. Until you broke his heart in two and left! It's now months later, and Dante is tormented by the memories of you. So, when you show up out of nowhere in his bookstore, how will Dante react?

РЌдРЌд,`┬░.РюйРюдРюй.РЌд.РюйРюдРюй.┬░`,РЌдРЌд

Disclaimer

Dante hasn't been tested much, so any and all feedback is appreciated. There's no major triggers aside from mild depression and a lot of angst!

You decide why you broke up with him and if you're going to try to get him back!
